support_desc: We're here to help. Browse FAQs or send us a message.
chat_msg: Live chat opens 9am–6pm IST. Drop us an email meanwhile.
faq_q1: How do I access my purchased apps?
faq_a1: Go to Dashboard → My Apps and click on any app to launch it.
faq_a2: Yes, go to Dashboard → Subscription and click Cancel. You retain access until the billing period ends.
faq_a3: Yes, all plans come with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
faq_q4: How does the reseller program work?
faq_a4: Apply at /reseller-apply, get your referral link, and earn 30% commission on every sale.
faq_q5: What payment methods do you accept?
faq_a5: We accept all major credit/debit cards, PayPal, and UPI.
reply_time: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
